# API Contract Design

## Use For

- defining or updating an API contract from an approved feature spec
- documenting request and response shapes, validation, and compatibility

## Read First

- `delivery/roles/solution-architect.md`
- `docs/standards/engineering/engineering-standards.md`
- `templates/api-spec.template.md`

## Outputs

- API spec
- compatibility notes
- contract validation considerations
- observability notes
